title: Morning fog patches expected along the coast this morning
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - There are no...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - There are no weather warnings issued for today, Thursday 24 July.


> You can expect the following:


Western CapeMorning fog patches are expected over the western interior and along the south coast. It will be partly cloudy and cool, but cold in the south-west, with isolated afternoon thunderstorms in the extreme north-east.

Light rain is expected over the extreme south-western parts from late morning, spreading along the south coast during the day.

The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh west to south-westerly, but southerly along the west coast. The expected UVB sunburn index: Low

Western half of the Eastern CapeCloudy with fog in places over interior at first, otherwise fine and cool, becoming partly cloudy with isolated showers and thundershowers.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly at first, otherwise moderate to fresh south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeCloudy with fog in places south of escapement at first, otherwise fine and cool, but cold in places in the north, becoming partly cloudy with isolated showers and thunder-showers.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly, becoming moderate south-westerly in the afternoon.


> Expected temperatures:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
